summary: Completed testing of Product Sourcing supplier migration from old suppliers (Spocket, CJdropshipping) to new suppliers (Faire, Zendrop). Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI verifications passed - supplier dropdown and product badges correctly showing only Faire and Zendrop.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/sourcing/categories returns 200
Backend: Categories response has suppliers array
Backend: Suppliers array contains ONLY 'all', 'faire', 'zendrop'
Backend: No old suppliers (Spocket, CJdropshipping) in categories
Backend: Faire supplier has correct label 'Faire'
Backend: Zendrop supplier has correct label 'Zendrop'
Backend: POST /api/admin/sourcing/search returns 200
Backend: Search response has products array
Backend: All products returned are from Faire or Zendrop ONLY
Backend: No old suppliers in search results
Backend: Filtering by 'faire' returns only Faire products
Backend: Filtering by 'zendrop' returns only Zendrop products
Backend: Products have required fields (id, name, supplier, cost, retail, margin)
Backend: Faire products have supplier field set to 'Faire'
Backend: Zendrop products have supplier field set to 'Zendrop'
Backend: Dog products available from valid suppliers
Backend: Cat products available from valid suppliers
Backend: Categories endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: Search endpoint requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: Admin Sourcing page loads at /admin/sourcing
Frontend: Supplier filter dropdown shows ONLY 3 options: All Suppliers, Faire, Zendrop
Frontend: No old suppliers (Spocket, CJdropshipping) in dropdown
Frontend: Faire badge displays with emerald/green styling (bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800)
Frontend: Zendrop badge displays with purple styling (bg-purple-100 text-purple-800)
Frontend: Product cards show supplier badges correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Product sourcing uses MOCKED data (not live APIs from Faire or Zendrop) - this is per design
Backend sourcing service correctly filters and returns products based on supplier parameter
Frontend getSupplierBadgeColor() function correctly maps Faire to emerald and Zendrop to purple
seed_data_creation: None - used existing mocked product catalog
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Sourcing now exclusively uses Faire and Zendrop suppliers. Old suppliers (Spocket, CJdropshipping) have been completely removed. Backend service at /app/backend/services/product_sourcing.py contains _get_faire_pet_catalog() and _get_zendrop_pet_catalog() methods. Frontend badge colors: Faire=emerald, Zendrop=purple. Admin credentials: admin@calmtails.com / admin123

mocked_apis.Product Sourcing: MOCKED - Uses hardcoded product catalogs in product_sourcing.py, not live APIs from Faire or Zendrop
